<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Medicare Cure Hub — README</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --green: #0d9488;
    --green-dark: #065f56;
    --green-light: #ccfbf1;
    --bg: #0f1117;
    --surface: #1a1f2e;
    --surface2: #232a3b;
    --border: #2a3347;
    --text: #e2e8f0;
    --muted: #94a3b8;
    --white: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body {
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f2027 0%, #065f56 50%, #0f2027 100%);
    padding: 80px 40px;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(13,148,136,0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
  }
  .hero-logo {
    font-size: 42px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .hero-logo span { color: var(--green); }
  .hero-sub {
    color: #94d4cc;
    font-size: 18px;
    margin: 12px 0 32px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .badge-row {
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
  }
  .badge {
    background: rgba(13,148,136,0.2);
    border: 1px solid var(--green);
    color: #5eead4;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* CONTAINER */
  .container { max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }

  /* SECTION */
  section { padding: 60px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  section:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  h2 {
    font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  }
  h2 .icon { font-size: 24px; }
  .section-desc { color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 15px; }
  h3 { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 12px; }

  /* SCREENSHOT */
  .screenshot {
    width: 100%;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    display: block;
  }
  .screenshot:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 28px 80px rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
  }
  .screenshot-wrap {
    position: relative;
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .screenshot-label {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px; left: 12px;
    background: rgba(13,148,136,0.9);
    color: white;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* GRID */
  .grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 24px; }
  .grid-1 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
  .grid-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; }

  /* FEATURE CARDS */
  .feature-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-top: 24px; }
  .feature-card {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 20px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .feature-card:hover { border-color: var(--green); }
  .feature-card .emoji { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .feature-card h4 { color: var(--white); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .feature-card p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; }

  /* TECH TABLE */
  .tech-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 20px; }
  .tech-table th {
    background: var(--surface2);
    color: var(--green);
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 13px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .tech-table td {
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .tech-table tr:hover td { background: var(--surface); }
  .tech-table code {
    background: var(--surface2);
    color: #5eead4;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  /* CODE BLOCK */
  .code-block {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 20px 24px;
    margin: 16px 0;
    font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Courier New', monospace;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    overflow-x: auto;
  }
  .code-block .comment { color: #4ade80; }
  .code-block .key { color: #f472b6; }
  .code-block .value { color: #fbbf24; }
  .code-block .cmd { color: #5eead4; }

  /* ROLES */
  .roles-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px; margin-top: 20px; }
  .role-card {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 16px;
  }
  .role-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .role-admin { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); color: #f87171; border: 1px solid #f87171; }
  .role-doctor { background: rgba(13,148,136,0.15); color: #5eead4; border: 1px solid #5eead4; }
  .role-nurse { background: rgba(168,85,247,0.15); color: #c084fc; border: 1px solid #c084fc; }
  .role-patient { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.15); color: #93c5fd; border: 1px solid #93c5fd; }
  .role-pharmacist { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.15); color: #fcd34d; border: 1px solid #fcd34d; }
  .role-lab { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #6ee7b7; border: 1px solid #6ee7b7; }
  .role-card p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; margin-top: 4px; }

  /* ALERT BOX */
  .alert {
    background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 16px 20px;
    margin: 16px 0;
    color: #fcd34d;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .alert strong { color: #f59e0b; }

  /* FOOTER */
  .footer {
    background: var(--surface);
    text-align: center;
    padding: 40px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .footer strong { color: var(--green); }

  @media (max-width: 720px) {
    .grid-2, .feature-grid, .roles-grid, .grid-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero { padding: 50px 20px; }
    .hero-logo { font-size: 30px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-logo">🏥 Medicare <span>Cure Hub</span></div>
  <div class="hero-sub">Production-Ready Hospital Management System</div>
  <div class="badge-row">
    <span class="badge">React 18 + TypeScript</span>
    <span class="badge">Spring Boot 3.2</span>
    <span class="badge">MySQL 8+</span>
    <span class="badge">Groq AI (CureBot)</span>
    <span class="badge">JWT Auth</span>
    <span class="badge">MIT License</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container">

  <!-- DASHBOARD SCREENSHOTS -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">🖥️</span> Dashboard Overview</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Real-time hospital metrics, appointment tracking, and analytics — available in light and dark mode.</p>
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Dashboard Light Mode">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Light Mode</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Dashboard Dark Mode">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Dark Mode</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- FEATURES -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">✨</span> Core Features</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Everything a modern hospital needs — built in one system.</p>
    <div class="feature-grid">
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">👥</div><h4>User Management</h4><p>Role-based access control for 6 user types with full CRUD</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">🔐</div><h4>JWT Authentication</h4><p>Spring Security-powered token auth with session management</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">🩺</div><h4>Patient Management</h4><p>Full profiles, medical history, prescriptions & lab reports</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">👨‍⚕️</div><h4>Doctor Management</h4><p>Availability scheduling, appointment conflicts, specializations</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">📅</div><h4>Appointments</h4><p>Book, reschedule, cancel with conflict detection & calendar view</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">💊</div><h4>Pharmacy</h4><p>Prescriptions, dispensing workflow, and inventory tracking</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">🧪</div><h4>Laboratory</h4><p>Lab test requests, sample tracking, and result submission</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">🧾</div><h4>Billing</h4><p>Invoice generation, payment status tracking in BDT (৳)</p></div>
      <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">🤖</div><h4>CureBot AI</h4><p>Groq-powered chatbot for FAQs, appointments & lab explanations</p></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- MODULE SCREENSHOTS -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">📸</span> Module Screenshots</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">A tour of the key modules in action.</p>

    <div style="margin-bottom:32px">
      <h3>👤 User Management</h3>
      <div class="screenshot-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="User Management">
        <div class="screenshot-label">User Management</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="grid-2" style="margin-bottom:32px">
      <div>
        <h3>👨‍⚕️ Doctors</h3>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Doctors">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Doctors</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>📅 Book Appointment</h3>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Appointment Booking">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Appointment Booking</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="grid-2" style="margin-bottom:32px">
      <div>
        <h3>💊 Pharmacy</h3>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Pharmacy">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Pharmacy</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>🧪 Laboratory</h3>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Laboratory">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Laboratory</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="grid-2">
      <div>
        <h3>🧾 Billing & Invoicing</h3>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Billing">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Billing</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>📊 Analytics & Reports</h3>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="Analytics">
          <div class="screenshot-label">Analytics</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CUREBOT -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">🤖</span> CureBot — AI Care Assistant</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Powered by Groq's <code style="background:var(--surface2);color:#5eead4;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px">llama-3.1-8b-instant</code> model — answers medical FAQs, booking guidance, and lab result explanations in real-time.</p>
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div>
        <div class="screenshot-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="screenshot" alt="CureBot AI">
          <div class="screenshot-label">CureBot</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;justify-content:center">
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">🔍</div><h4>Doctor Availability</h4><p>Real-time availability queries with database integration</p></div>
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">📋</div><h4>Appointment Guidance</h4><p>Step-by-step booking help and scheduling advice</p></div>
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">🧬</div><h4>Lab Result Explanations</h4><p>Plain-language breakdown of test results for patients</p></div>
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="emoji">💡</div><h4>Medical FAQ</h4><p>General medication info and symptom guidance</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- TECH STACK -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">🛠️</span> Tech Stack</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Modern, production-grade technologies across the full stack.</p>
    <table class="tech-table">
      <tr><th>Layer</th><th>Technologies</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Frontend</td><td><code>React 18</code> <code>TypeScript</code> <code>Vite</code> <code>Tailwind CSS</code> <code>shadcn/ui</code> <code>Radix UI</code></td></tr>
      <tr><td>Backend</td><td><code>Spring Boot 3.2</code> <code>Java 17</code> <code>Spring Security</code> <code>JWT</code> <code>Spring Data JPA</code></td></tr>
      <tr><td>Database</td><td><code>MySQL 8+</code> <code>Hibernate ORM</code></td></tr>
      <tr><td>API Client</td><td><code>Axios</code> <code>TanStack Query</code></td></tr>
      <tr><td>AI Layer</td><td><code>Groq API</code> <code>llama-3.1-8b-instant</code> <code>Spring RestTemplate</code></td></tr>
      <tr><td>Build Tools</td><td><code>npm</code> <code>Maven 3.9+</code></td></tr>
    </table>
  </section>

  <!-- QUICK START -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">🚀</span> Quick Start</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Get up and running in minutes.</p>

    <h3>Prerequisites</h3>
    <div class="code-block">
      <span class="comment"># Required</span><br>
      Java 17+ &nbsp;&nbsp; Maven 3.9+ &nbsp;&nbsp; Node.js 18+ &nbsp;&nbsp; MySQL 8+<br>
      <span class="comment"># Get free Groq API key at console.groq.com</span>
    </div>

    <h3 style="margin-top:24px">Backend</h3>
    <div class="code-block">
      <span class="cmd">cd backend</span><br>
      <span class="cmd">mvn spring-boot:run</span><br>
      <span class="comment"># Runs at http://localhost:8080</span>
    </div>

    <h3>Frontend</h3>
    <div class="code-block">
      <span class="cmd">npm install</span><br>
      <span class="cmd">npm run dev</span><br>
      <span class="comment"># Runs at http://localhost:5173</span>
    </div>

    <h3>Environment Config — <code style="font-size:13px;color:#94a3b8">backend/src/main/resources/application.properties</code></h3>
    <div class="code-block">
      <span class="comment"># MySQL</span><br>
      <span class="key">spring.datasource.url</span>=<span class="value">jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medicare_hms?createDatabaseIfNotExist=true</span><br>
      <span class="key">spring.datasource.username</span>=<span class="value">root</span><br>
      <span class="key">spring.datasource.password</span>=<span class="value">your_mysql_password</span><br><br>
      <span class="comment"># JWT</span><br>
      <span class="key">jwt.secret</span>=<span class="value">replace_with_strong_secret_32_chars_minimum</span><br>
      <span class="key">jwt.expiration</span>=<span class="value">86400000</span><br><br>
      <span class="comment"># Groq AI</span><br>
      <span class="key">groq.api.key</span>=<span class="value">your_groq_api_key_here</span><br>
      <span class="key">groq.model</span>=<span class="value">llama-3.1-8b-instant</span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- USER ROLES -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">👥</span> User Roles & Permissions</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Six distinct roles with carefully scoped access control.</p>
    <div class="roles-grid">
      <div class="role-card">
        <div class="role-badge role-admin">Admin</div>
        <p>Full system access — users, doctors, patients, billing, analytics, and reports</p>
      </div>
      <div class="role-card">
        <div class="role-badge role-doctor">Doctor</div>
        <p>Assigned patients, appointments, prescriptions, lab report review</p>
      </div>
      <div class="role-card">
        <div class="role-badge role-nurse">Nurse</div>
        <p>Patient and appointment workflow assistance</p>
      </div>
      <div class="role-card">
        <div class="role-badge role-patient">Patient</div>
        <p>Book appointments, view prescriptions, lab results, and medical history</p>
      </div>
      <div class="role-card">
        <div class="role-badge role-pharmacist">Pharmacist</div>
        <p>Medicine inventory management and prescription dispensing</p>
      </div>
      <div class="role-card">
        <div class="role-badge role-lab">Lab Staff</div>
        <p>Manage lab tests, process samples, and submit results</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- KNOWN ISSUES -->
  <section>
    <h2><span class="icon">⚠️</span> Known Issues & Fixes</h2>
    <div class="alert"><strong>Groq Model:</strong> Use <code style="color:#fcd34d">llama-3.1-8b-instant</code> — the old <code style="color:#fcd34d">llama3-8b-8192</code> was retired in August 2025.</div>
    <div class="alert"><strong>Backend Fix:</strong> Add <code style="color:#fcd34d">@JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)</code> to all Groq response inner classes in <code style="color:#fcd34d">AIChatbotService.java</code>.</div>
    <div class="alert"><strong>CureBot Connectivity:</strong> If unreachable, verify backend internet access to <code style="color:#fcd34d">https://api.groq.com</code>.</div>
    <div class="alert"><strong>Security:</strong> Keep <code style="color:#fcd34d">application.properties</code> secrets out of git — add it to <code style="color:#fcd34d">.gitignore</code>.</div>
  </section>

</div>

<div class="footer">
  <div style="font-size:28px;margin-bottom:8px">🏥</div>
  <strong>Medicare Cure Hub</strong> — Hospital Management System<br>
  <span style="font-size:13px;margin-top:6px;display:block">Released under the MIT License</span>
</div>

</body>
</html>
